next_action: Two HIGH-tier candidates remaining: (1) debt #31 — port the `pickedHome = p >= 0.5` transform from reliability.ts (PR #30) into resolve-predictions.ts:getCalibration() (~30 min fix affecting live calibration plot quality). (2) Debt #32 (new, filed Sprint 10.10) — shadow-analysis CLI/endpoint to compute Brier/MAE delta once N≥30 shadow pairs accumulate per (sport × model). Bonferroni or primary-metric pre-declaration required (8 comparisons). Filter pairs to |adj.made_at - naive.made_at| < 60s to exclude temporal-skew backfills. Also watch: ESPN injury signal returned zero home_out_impact on all NBA/NFL/MLB/NHL picks on the 2026-04-22 18:31 UTC cron — re-verify on next cron; if persistent, escalate toward debt #19 (second injury provider).

pipeline.shadow_rows_note: Live deploy 2026-04-22 18:27 UTC; first post-deploy cron returned zero shadows because ESPN injury signal was flat across all sports. Watch next cron.

models.v1: v0 + flip when visitor has 10+ more wins
models.v2: v1 + point differential (4 discrete buckets, superseded by v5)
models.v4-spread: continuous margin model + INJURY adjustment + MLB pitcher ERA. NBA home-adv 2.25 (debt #27, PR #34)
models.v4-spread-naive: shadow of v4-spread with injuries=undefined. Written when hasInjuryData && !lowConfidence.
models.v5: continuous sigmoid + INJURY adjustment. Scales: NBA/NFL 0.10, MLB 0.30, NHL 0.45, MLS 0.80 (updated Sprint 10.10), EPL 0.90 (updated Sprint 10.10)
models.v5-naive: shadow of v5 via predictWithInjuries(game, ctx, undefined). Written when hasInjuryData && !lowConfidence. Forward A/B infra for injury signal (debt #14, PR #38).
